## Testing

The gate is `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run backtest` (all green).

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run backtest`
- [ ] New behavior has a `test/smoke.ts` assertion and updated docs
